hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */CV/CV.tex) cd "$(dirname "$f")" && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode CV.tex >/dev/null 2>&1 && cp CV.pdf ../assets/pdf/CV_Hanrong_Zhang.pdf && echo '{"systemMessage":"CV.pdf synced to assets/pdf/CV_Hanrong_Zhang.pdf"}';; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Compiling CV and syncing to website...
